channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Marc Jacobs Tests Social-First Content Series as a New Advertising Model
item.description: Marc Jacobs partnered with Rachel Sennott on a series designed for social media, joining a growing group of fashion brands experimenting with creator-led content formats.

item.title: Bed Bath and Beyond Returns to California with Revised Store Strategy
item.description: Less than a year after exiting California, Bed Bath and Beyond is re-entering the state under a new retail approach.

item.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Travels to Pakistan for US Ceasefire Talks
item.description: Iran's top diplomat traveled to Pakistan on Friday, where officials are working to convene a second round of negotiations between the United States and Iran.

item.title: Data Centers Pairing Batteries with Gas Generators to Manage AI Power Demands
item.description: As AI increases strain on the electrical grid, data center operators are combining battery storage with natural gas generators to maintain reliable power supply.

item.title: AI Tools Are Helping Fill a Growing Primary Care Physician Shortage in the US
item.description: With fewer primary care doctors available, companies including OpenAI, Amazon, and Google are developing AI tools aimed at supporting physicians and healthcare providers.
